On this page

AI Image Renamer ​

AI Image Renamer automatically gives your uploaded images meaningful, search-friendly filenames — powered by artificial intelligence. Instead of keeping file names like IMG_1234.jpg, the plugin analyzes what's in the image and renames it to something descriptive, like golden-retriever-playing-park.jpg.

It works in the background every time you upload an image through the WordPress Media Library. You don't need to do anything — just upload as usual and the plugin takes care of the rest.

Features ​

  • 🤖 AI-Powered Naming — Uses advanced AI models to understand what's in your image and generate a descriptive filename.
  • 🔍 SEO-Optimized — Creates clean, keyword-rich filenames that help search engines find your images, improving your site's SEO.
  • 🔒 Secure by Default — Your API key is encrypted before it's stored in the database, so it's never saved as plain text.
  • 🎯 Smart Alt Text — Optionally fills in the image's alt attribute automatically, which helps with accessibility and SEO.
  • ⚙️ Fully Configurable — Choose which image types to process, how many keywords to include, and which AI model to use — all from the settings page.
  • 🛡️ Graceful Fallback — If the AI service is temporarily unavailable, your image is still uploaded with its original filename. Nothing breaks.
  • 🚀 Free to Use — The plugin connects to Groq's free AI service. No credit card or paid subscription needed.

How It Works ​

Every time you upload an image, the plugin sends it to an AI service called Groq. The AI looks at the image, figures out what it shows, and returns a short description. The plugin then turns that description into a clean, web-friendly filename and saves the image under the new name.

If you've also enabled the alt text feature, the same description is used to fill in the image's alt text — the text that screen readers and search engines use to understand what an image shows.

Example ​

BeforeAfter
IMG_1234.jpggolden-retriever-playing-fetch-sunny-park.jpg
photo_2026.pngmodern-office-desk-laptop-coffee.png
screenshot.webpwordpress-dashboard-settings-page.webp

Supported Formats ​

The plugin works with the most common image formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, and GIF. You can choose which formats to include in the settings.

Requirements ​

  • WordPress 6.0 or higher
  • PHP 8.2 or higher (your hosting provider can confirm this)
  • A free Groq API key — get one at console.groq.com

References ​

  • GitHub Repository
  • GitLab Repository
  • WordPress.org Plugin Page
  • Groq API Console

License ​

AI Image Renamer is released under the GPL-2.0-or-later license.
